description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small teardrop notch at the top for the front-facing camera, and minimal bezels on all sides. The back panel is a gradient blue to purple color, housing a vertical array of four camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner, along with a subtle fingerprint sensor in the upper center. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible buttons likely for power and volume control. The overall design is contemporary and stylish, suitable for everyday urban use and easily recognizable as a Redmi device.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, gradient blue back, and a vertical quad-camera array. The design is slim, with minimal bezels and a teardrop notch for the front camera.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the phone's slim thickness and slight camera bump.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large screen with a teardrop notch and minimal bezels.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, again highlighting the slimness and camera bump.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a gradient blue to purple finish, quad-camera array, flash, and fingerprint sensor.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Redmi' logo is visible in white text on the lower left corner of the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a pastel gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications, suggesting the phone is either on the lock screen or displaying a default background.
attribute_camera_placement: There are four camera lenses arranged vertically in the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash module to the right of the camera array.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a volume rocker and a power button, both slim and elongated.
